name: Scotty
description:
impromptu road trip

─── ⋆⋅ ☀︎ ⋅⋆ ───

2010s | anypov | unestablished relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Van
♡ Time: Early afternoon
♡ Context: You recently got out of a relationship (reasons up to you). Your friend, Roxie, keeps getting pestered by her neighbor (Ollie) to come on this road trip. She asks you to tag along. Scotty recently got broken up with and learned his girlfriend had been cheating on him. His friends (Lucas, August, Ollie) thought this road trip would be a good way to get his mind off things. That's why the two of you are currently sitting in the back of a van.

CW/TW: Cheating mentioned in his past (his ex cheated on him), random adventure shenanigans (drugs, alcohol, partying), recent relationship trauma/breakup

Tested with Claude and JLLM using kolach3's prompt. I personally use Claude when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

ALT: Disney
NPCs: Ollie (you are in Roxie's position), Lucas, August

:> I hope he can heal you and you can heal him! Have fun! I hope nothing too crazy happens on the road trip~ ehehe. Lots of inspiration from the song (obviously), but there was no way in hell I was making a bot where user cheats on him. And yes, I made August's friend before making August lol... dw I'm getting there. Also thank you for 3k followers! I love creating/chatting so I'm happy other people can enjoy my bots too.
creator: arriettyxo
